findings.title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
findings.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

findings.title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
findings.description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.

findings.title: algorithmicsuperintelligence/optillm
findings.description: Optimizing inference proxy for LLMs

findings.title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
findings.description: A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

findings.title: jd-opensource/xllm
findings.description: A high-performance inference engine for LLMs, optimized for diverse AI accelerators.

findings.title: intel/auto-round
findings.description: SOTA rounding-based quantization for high-accuracy low-bit LLM inference, seamlessly optimized for CPU/XPU/CUDA, with multi-datatype support and full compatibility with vLLM, SGLang, and Transformers.

findings.title: zhihu/ZhiLight
findings.description: A highly optimized LLM inference acceleration engine for Llama and its variants.

findings.title: turboderp-org/exllamav3
findings.description: An optimized quantization and inference library for running LLMs locally on modern consumer-class GPUs

findings.title: NLPOptimize/flash-tokenizer
findings.description: EFFICIENT AND OPTIMIZED TOKENIZER ENGINE FOR LLM INFERENCE SERVING

findings.title: toverainc/willow-inference-server
findings.description: Open source, local, and self-hosted highly optimized language inference server supporting ASR/STT, TTS, and LLM across WebRTC, REST, and WS

findings.title: AI-Hypercomputer/JetStream
findings.description: JetStream is a throughput and memory optimized engine for LLM inference on XLA devices, starting with TPUs (and GPUs in future -- PRs welcome).

findings.title: facebookresearch/LayerSkip
findings.description: Code for "LayerSkip: Enabling Early Exit Inference and Self-Speculative Decoding", ACL 2024

findings.title: dusty-nv/NanoLLM
findings.description: Optimized local inference for LLMs with HuggingFace-like APIs for quantization, vision/language models, multimodal agents, speech, vector DB, and RAG.

findings.title: RayFernando1337/LLM-Calc
findings.description: Instantly calculate the maximum size of quantized language models that can fit in your available RAM, helping you optimize your models for inference.

findings.title: SandAI-org/MagiCompiler
findings.description: A plug-and-play compiler that delivers free-lunch optimizations for both inference and training.

findings.title: OpenBMB/CPM.cu
findings.description: CPM.cu is a lightweight, high-performance CUDA implementation for LLMs, optimized for end-device inference and featuring cutting-edge techniques in sparse architecture, speculative sampling and quantization.

findings.title: chenhongyu2048/LLM-inference-optimization-paper
findings.description: Summary of some awesome work for optimizing  LLM inference

findings.title: bentoml/llm-optimizer
findings.description: Benchmark and optimize LLM inference across frameworks with ease

findings.title: codefuse-ai/FasterTransformer4CodeFuse
findings.description: High-performance LLM inference based on our optimized version of FastTransfomer

findings.title: jkanalakis/deep-recall
findings.description: Enterprise-grade memory framework for LLMs featuring GPU-optimized inference, vector storage, and automated scaling. Enables hyper-personalized responses through efficient context retrieval and integration.
